'''Duriet''' was the [[Marriage/Legends|wife]] of [[Musician/Legends|musician]] and former [[Corellian militia]] member [[Grondorn Muse]]. When the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] blacklisted their<ref name="Card" /> [[Gender/Legends|husband]]<ref name="SWG">{{GalaxiesAED}}</ref> because of the [[Politics/Legends|political]] content of his [[Music/Legends|songs]], both Grondorn and Duriet joined the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] prior to the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]].<ref name="Card" />

==Behind the scenes==
Duriet was mentioned on Grondorn Muse's character card for the [[November]] [[1998]] ''[[Special Edition Limited]]'' expansion set of [[Decipher]]'s [[Star Wars Customizable Card Game|''Star Wars'' Customizable Card Game]].<ref name="Card" /> As Muse's name is an anagram of singer Gordon Sumner, better known as [[Wikipedia:Sting (musician)|Sting]], Duriet's given name is an anagram of Sting's wife [[Wikipedia:Trudie Styler|Trudie's]] given name.<ref name="Sting article">{{WebCite|url=https://www.telegraph.co.uk/women/womens-business/10754984/Trudie-Styler-interview-I-get-a-lot-of-mud-slung-at-me.html|text=Trudie Styler interview: 'I get a lot of mud slung at me'|date=2014-04-13, 7:00AM BST|work=The Telegraph|archivedate=20170814025030}}</ref>
